doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: It presents implausible publication identifiers and unverified legal assertions about Illinois 5-day pay-or-quit obligations that cannot be corroborated as an authentic HUD fact sheet.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 88
REASON: The document contains specific identifiers and legal claims (“TRF-2026-IL,” co-issuance with an “Illinois Attorney General Tenant Bulletin,” and sweeping statements about 5-day pay-or-quit obligations) that do not match recognizable, verifiable HUD publication patterns and include likely inaccurate substantive assertions without any citationable authority.
